title: whats that statue
wikitext:
[]: whats that statue?             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 18, 2007 4:37 am in ep' 24 when Shinji first meets Kaworu, Kaworu is standing on an Angel-looking statue. when getting a better look at it in Death and Rebirth and the beginning of EoE, it looks a lot like the MP Eva's after 3I. their heads kinda exploded, and petrified. but how could that be a petrified MP Eva before the MPE's were even completed and 3I oh, and sry if it seems like im posting a lot, but i just got done watching Death and Rebrith, and theres lots of questions swirling around in my mind

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Oct 18, 2007 5:50 am I think it's just a statue. Another little subtle visual que from Anno, linking Kaworu with the Angels. Perhaps the subtext is "fallen angel"?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Oct 18, 2007 6:47 am I always thought it looked like EVA-00...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 18, 2007 7:03 am A really old presentation on the statue that people tend to find helpful (by me).

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Oct 18, 2007 8:40 am Reichu wrote: A really old presentation on the statue that people tend to find helpful (by me).

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 18, 2007 9:38 pm but the statue is nearly identical to the MPEs

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 18, 2007 9:51 pm It's called foreshadowing

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 18, 2007 9:56 pm Reichu wrote: A really old presentation on the statue that people tend to find helpful (by me).

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Oct 19, 2007 5:03 am I kept wondering what was with that statue. Sometimes the statue looks like it's right in the middle of the lake, or otherwise, its at the shoreline. We never ever see a statue like this anywhere else before in the series, and it only comes up along with Kaworu in the very end. Combine that with the bleeding, and I wonder if that's Kentucky Fried Eva-00's remains, compressed in size. Apart from the obvious Lilith/MPE resemblances outlined in the article, there really is no data on that Statue's origin. Tokyo-3 is an odd place to keep a wierd Angel statue like that, where'd it come? Ah, and the shadow of the statue on the lake after Kaworu's demise also signfies the fall of the Angels. The last being born from Adam dies.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Oct 19, 2007 6:31 am UrsusArctos wrote: I kept wondering what was with that statue. Sometimes the statue looks like it's right in the middle of the lake, or otherwise, its at the shoreline. We never ever see a statue like this anywhere else before in the series, and it only comes up along with Kaworu in the very end. Combine that with the bleeding, and I wonder if that's Kentucky Fried Eva-00's remains, compressed in size. Apart from the obvious Lilith/MPE resemblances outlined in the article, there really is no data on that Statue's origin. Tokyo-3 is an odd place to keep a wierd Angel statue like that, where'd it come? Ah, and the shadow of the statue on the lake after Kaworu's demise also signfies the fall of the Angels. The last being born from Adam dies.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 19, 2007 8:35 am UrsusArctos wrote: Sometimes the statue looks like it's right in the middle of the lake, or otherwise, its at the shoreline.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 19, 2007 9:09 am Sachiel_13 wrote: but the statue is nearly identical to the MPEs

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Fri Oct 19, 2007 10:55 am They're the MP-evas, just like Keep Rebuild in the Rebuild sub-forum. Those statues are the remains of the MPs after they get fossilized. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Oct 19, 2007 10:50 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Sachiel_13 wrote: but the statue is nearly identical to the MPEs

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 9:46 pm not really, it was his dummy system in the Eva's entry plug, so to show that the wrote in on the Entry plug. the Evas would fight as if they were being piloted by Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 31, 2007 9:49 pm Did Eva-01 fight as if it was piloted by Rei during Bardiel?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Nov 01, 2007 12:14 am somewhat i think, i think in that case it was more Lilith just becoming more synched with Yui. maybe. i dont know if im going on about something completely wrong, please correct me

[]:             Quote Post by King_Panther13 » Thu Nov 01, 2007 9:16 am Keep Rebuild in the Rebuild sub-forum. Maybe just me raving when I have a severe lack of sleep, but hey, who knows, I may be onto something.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Nov 01, 2007 6:30 pm ....that had nothing to do with Rebuild

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Nov 01, 2007 6:42 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: ....that had nothing to do with Rebuild
